info.title: LifeSaver AI Assistant API
info.description:
Interactive REST API documentation for the LifeSaver AI Assistant platform. Explore, test, and understand all available backend endpoints.

### 👥 Contacts & Repository Details
- **Developer:** Shivani Nagda
- **GitHub Repository:** [https://github.com/ShivaniNagda/lifesaver-ai-os](https://github.com/ShivaniNagda/lifesaver-ai-os)
- **Portfolio:** [https://ShivaniNagda.vercel.app](https://ShivaniNagda.vercel.app)
- **LinkedIn:** [https://www.linkedin.com/in/shivaninagda](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shivaninagda)
- **Support Email:** shivanifs.1786145@gmail.com

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Endpoints managing secure user registration, log in, log out, and session password restorations.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Retrieve general properties and metadata of active user accounts.

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: Manage user profile properties and Base64-based avatar picture files on disk.

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Retrieve real-time consolidated productivity stats and performance indices.

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Task management operations for planning, scheduling, and updating user deadlines.

tags.name: Goals
tags.description: Manage mid-to-long term objectives, complete with interactive milestone check-ins.

tags.name: Habits
tags.description: Define routine trackers, increment streak counts, and analyze adherence history logs.

tags.name: Calendar
tags.description: Schedule structural time-blocks and coordinate daily commitments.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Dispatch system warning alert panels, smart email coaching notes, and configure delivery rules.

tags.name: AI Assistant
tags.description: Run advanced multi-topic study course schedulers and inspect multi-agent system execution traces.

tags.name: AI Planner
tags.description: Autonomous schedule allocation planners optimizing workflows and detecting burnout risk factors.

tags.name: AI Chat
tags.description: Engage in cognitive twin chat sessions mimicking your productivity style.

tags.name: AI Negotiator
tags.description: Automatically draft polite and highly convincing deadline extension letter drafts.

tags.name: OCR Scanner
tags.description: Extract raw schedule/syllabus information from image attachments and convert them to rich JSON schemas.

tags.name: Settings
tags.description: Fetch and update system tuning preferences and selected model families.

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: SaaS aggregates mapping performance variables, completion trends, and burnouts.

BearerAuth.description: Enter your secure JWT token. Format required: `Bearer <your_jwt_token>`.

description.example: Revise binary trees, heap sort, and graph algorithms before the mock coding round.
Build five functional modules, audit the API endpoints with OpenAPI specs, and deploy the production-ready platform.
Reviewing load balancers and horizontal partitioning schemas.

message.example: You have scheduled 12 hours of intense work. Shift some blocks to prevent fatigue.

image.description: Base64 encoded JPG, PNG, WEBP image with data URL wrapper

context.example: I need to complete coding tasks, sleep 8 hours, and prepare for exams.

reason.example: Suffered from an internet downtime outage for 48 hours

userMessage.example: I feel unmotivated today, how do I get back on track?

context.example: Wants to complete 2 DSA assignments before dark.

post.summary: Create a new user account
post.description: Registers a new user record in the persistent DB with username, email, and password properties.

400.description: Validation error or email already in use

post.summary: Authenticate user credentials
post.description: Validates email and password, and issues a standard JWT access bearer token if successful.

post.summary: Invalidate user sessions
post.description: Signs the user out and clears standard authorization cookies.

post.summary: Request a password reset link token
post.description: Dispatches a recovery reset token to the matching registered email address.

post.summary: Set a new password using reset token
post.description: Applies a new structural password string when presented with a valid matching reset token.

get.description: Fetches account variables for the active bearer token owner.

put.description: Alters user properties (username, email, or credentials) in the database.

get.description: Fetches the stored relative filepath or URL reference for the active user's avatar.

post.summary: Upload profile avatar picture
post.description: Takes a Base64-wrapped image data URI (JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP), writes a file on disk, updates profile parameters, and returns the relative asset path.

400.description: Invalid format or size exceed limits

put.description: Replaces the active avatar picture on disk with a new Base64-wrapped image representation.

delete.description: Removes the avatar picture file on disk and resets user profileImage parameters back to empty.

get.description: Assembles comprehensive statistical metrics counting total tasks, completion progress, habit streaks, goals achievement rate, and structural burnout levels.

200.description: SaaS productivity aggregates and charts parameters

get.description: Fetches all active tasks belonging to the authenticated user.

post.summary: Create a new task
post.description: Appends a new task item under the authenticated user session.

put.description: Modifies properties of a specific task matched by its unique database ID.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a specific task item from database registers.

get.description: Fetches a full structural array of goal objects registered under the user.

post.summary: Establish a new goal parameters
post.description: Registers a new structured objective with targets, milestone steps, and milestones arrays.

put.description: Alters properties or milestones progress parameters inside a matching goal.

delete.description: Permanently drops a goal and its children milestones from databases.

get.description: Fetches user routine objects, tracking streaks and daily checking progress flags.

post.summary: Register a new routine habit
post.description: Inserts a new daily or weekly routine habit monitor into persistent schedules.

put.description: Alters properties, title, frequency, or completes habit streak checkpoints.

delete.summary: Permanently discard a habit tracking stream

get.description: Fetches structural arrays of scheduled blocks mapped onto the interactive calendar canvas.

post.summary: Pin a block of time onto the calendar
post.description: Pins an isolated hourly commitment event or study block directly into database agendas.

put.description: Updates hours, dates, labels, or properties of an existing calendar event block.

delete.description: Permanently dismisses calendar event blocks from the user's agenda.

post.summary: Run active Gemini-driven planning simulation engine
post.description: Triggers the core AI Planner engine, executing an optimized structural schedule layout, analyzing risk flags, and creating custom micro-pacing recommendations.

200.description: Optimized schedule timelines, burnout risk forecasts, and multi-agent reports

post.summary: Draft an automated persuasive deadline extension letter
post.description: Applies specified excuse reasonings, professor names, and selected tones to draft elegant request emails using Gemini AI.

draft.example:
Dear Professor H. Miller,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to respectfully request a short deadline extension...

post.summary: Interact with your custom productivity double
post.description: Sends messages to a specialized conversational bot context-fed with your actual tasks, habits, and preferences.

response.example: Let's chunk your Java DSA revision down to 3 smaller steps. Start with 1 heap sort heapify function right now!

get.summary: Fetch conversational twin chat session logs
get.description: Fetches the conversational history records logged between the user and their twin chatbot.

200.description: Array of logged chat dialogue objects

post.summary: Generate specialized exam or interview preparation pathways
post.description: Constructs structured progressive milestone blocks mapping subjects to days left using AI.

plan.example:
Day 1: Focus heavily on System Design fundamentals.
Day 2: Mock coding on heap sort...

get.summary: Fetch internal multi-agent execution and reasoning traces
get.description: Retrieves debug logs listing actions processed by internal autonomous AI planners.

details.example: Allocated 4 slots for study, flagged 1 hour overlapping work.

post.summary: Upload visual schedule and parse text raw elements
post.description: Processes syllabus files or calendar images through visual OCR scanning and extracts raw textual notes.

image.description: Base64 data URI of the JPG/PNG schedule file

rawText.example:
CS101 Syllabus:
Complete Java DSA Revision due July 5
Exam on July 10

post.summary: Convert parsed text into structured tasks components
post.description: Takes extracted visual OCR raw text inputs and parses them into organized structural lists using Gemini reasoning models.

rawText.example: Tomorrow 8 PM study chemistry. Next Tuesday exam.

200.description: Tasks and AI scheduling diagnostics generated successfully

post.summary: Approve and import OCR-scanned task elements into DB
post.description: Saves approved schedules to your core database task registers and sets up calendar time blocks.

get.summary: Fetch OCR image scanning history log list
get.description: Lists historic scans complete with extracted markdown text values, matching ids, and dates.

200.description: Returns arrays of logged scans on file

delete.summary: Delete an OCR scanning record from logs
delete.description: Drops an individual image scanning history record from database history logs.

get.summary: Fetch alerts and active notifications list
get.description: Fetches the full unread warning panel cards and diagnostic alert updates logged.

post.summary: Manually emit a custom notification
post.description: Creates and registers a custom system notification in the persistent database.

get.summary: Fetch sent coaching email dispatch logs
get.description: Fetches logged delivery entries for all smart coaching emails triggered on behalf of the user.

200.description: Array of sent email logging markers

subject.example: [LifeSaver] Complete Java DSA Revision Deadline Coaching Alert

bodyExcerpt.example: You have scheduled 12 hours of intense work...

post.summary: Dispatch a real-time test coaching email to your inbox
post.description: Dispatches a live HTML sample alert containing adaptive workflow coaching tips directly to the user's register email.

200.description: Test email successfully dispatched and logged

put.description: Configures boolean rules managing which email triggers (24h, 3h, 30m, Missed) the scheduler runs.

post.summary: Manually trigger immediate scanning of all pending task deadlines
post.description: Forces the notification scheduler to scan for impending task deadlines and dispatch matching alerts immediately.

put.description: Flags a specific system notification card as read.
Alters structural delivery logs of an alert including soundPlayed, browserSent, and custom delivery statuses.

delete.summary: Dismiss and permanently discard an alert notification
delete.description: Permanently deletes a specific notification card matched by database ID.

get.description: Retrieves work hour limits, pacing intervals, focus level configurations, and active model family details.

put.summary: Modify configuration fields or active model settings
put.description: Updates global workspace rules, notification toggles, or selected LLM types.
